Estimated web-supported fill. Because no complete December 2025 hourly series was available in the workbook, AQI mean/median were estimated from the December 2025 daily-category mix reported by AQI.IN (Poor 5 days, Unhealthy 22 days, Severe 4 days) using category midpoints; AQI min anchored at 104 from the public search snippet; AQI max kept at 304 from the user-provided value. PM2.5 fields were derived from AQI using US EPA / Bangladesh DoE breakpoint mapping. hourly_observations and coverage remain 0 because this row is not reconstructed from an hourly dataset. | https://www.iqair.com/us/newsroom/december-23-2025-dhaka-among-top-10-most-polluted-cities-in-the-world | https://www.iqair.com/us/newsroom/dhaka-among-top-10-most-polluted-cities-in-the-world-12-9-2025 | https://www.jagonews24.com/en/national/news/87807 | https://en.somoynews.tv/news/2025-12-29/QNYFL29F | https://www.newagebd.net/post/environment-climate-change/285956/dhaka-becomes-3rd-most-polluted-city-with-aqi-score-of-252 | https://www.aqi.in/dashboard/bangladesh/dhaka/dhaka/historical-analysis | HDI kept at 0.685 exactly. 2025 population uses Worldometer.
